title: McBunneh CPVP Private!
description: This project adds a more smoother gameplay whilst still being very vanilla , if you want more FPS and still have the vanilla feel THIS is the pack for you!
body:
✨ McBunneh CPVP Private! – Clean Endgame Aesthetic

A sleek and minimal resource pack designed to enhance your late-game Minecraft experience without changing the core feel of the game.

This pack focuses on Endgame visuals and clarity, giving powerful gear and blocks a polished, modern look while keeping everything recognizable and vanilla-friendly.

🔮 Features
Refined Netherite and Diamond armor visuals
Enhanced beacon and obsidian styling
Clean and vibrant Totem of Undying redesign
Subtle glow improvements for important blocks
Balanced colors for a smooth, cinematic look
🎯 Perfect For
Survival endgame worlds
PvP & hardcore players
Aesthetic builds and screenshots
Players who want vanilla+ visuals
⚙️ Style
Vanilla-friendly
Clean & minimal
Slightly vibrant, not over-the-top
